name: Sauteed Chicken Spinach Salad with Raspberry
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sliced water chestnuts (8 oz.), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the raspberry sauce by blending together 1/2 cup fresh raspberries (or frozen unsweetened, thawed), 8 oz. Silken tofu, 3 tablespoons white wine vinegar, and 3 tablespoons sugar in a blender or food processor until well blended.
2. Saute chicken in mirin and reduced sodium soy sauce until cooked through. Remove from heat and slice the chicken.
3. Arrange spinach on individual serving plates. Top with sliced chicken; evenly distribute water chestnuts over each serving.
4. Serve with raspberry tofu sauce.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 6 minutes
Makes 4 servings
